commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
# Start VM: resize MIG to 1 on morning schedule or manual trigger.
# Auth via Workload Identity Federation (same as deploy.yml, no JSON keys).
# Disable via VM_SCHEDULE_ENABLED=false GitHub variable.

name: "Start VM"

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 6 * * *'  # 06:00 UTC Mon-Sun
  workflow_dispatch: {}

concurrency:
  group: vm-schedule
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  start:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20
    if: >-
      github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
      vars.VM_SCHEDULE_ENABLED != 'false'

    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write

    env:
      GCP_PROJECT: ${{ vars.TF_VAR_project_id }}
      GCP_REGION: us-central1
      MIG_NAME: n8n-mig
      N8N_HOST: ${{ vars.TF_VAR_n8n_public_host }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout scripts & actions
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            .github/scripts
            .github/actions
          sparse-checkout-cone-mode: false

      - name: Auth to GCP (WIF)
        uses: google-github-actions/auth@v3
        with:
          workload_identity_provider: ${{ secrets.WIF_PROVIDER }}
          service_account: ${{ secrets.WIF_SA }}

      - name: Set up Cloud SDK
        uses: google-github-actions/setup-gcloud@v2

      - name: Resize MIG to 1
        run: |
          CURRENT_SIZE=$(gcloud compute instance-groups managed describe "$MIG_NAME" \
            --region="$GCP_REGION" \
            --project="$GCP_PROJECT" \
            --format="value(targetSize)" 2>/dev/null) || {
            echo "::error::Failed to get MIG size"
            exit 1
          }
          echo "::notice::Current MIG target size: $CURRENT_SIZE"

          if [ "$CURRENT_SIZE" = "1" ]; then
            echo "::notice::MIG already at size=1 — skipping resize"
          else
            echo "::notice::start — resizing $MIG_NAME from $CURRENT_SIZE to 1"
            gcloud compute instance-groups managed resize "$MIG_NAME" \
              --size=1 \
              --region="$GCP_REGION" \
              --project="$GCP_PROJECT" \
              --quiet || exit 1
          fi

      - name: Wait for VM to become healthy
        run: |
          bash .github/scripts/wait-gcp-mig.sh \
            --name "$MIG_NAME" \
            --region "$GCP_REGION" \
            --project "$GCP_PROJECT" \
            --timeout 900 \
            --verbose

      - name: Health check (n8n /healthz)
        if: env.N8N_HOST != ''
        run: |
          bash .github/scripts/wait-url.sh \
            --url "https://$N8N_HOST/healthz" \
            --code 200 \
            --timeout 600

      - name: Send Telegram notification
        if: always() && vars.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID != ''
        uses: ./.github/actions/telegram-notify
        with:
          bot_token: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
          chat_id: ${{ vars.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}
          thread_id: ${{ vars.TELEGRAM_THREAD_ID }}
          status: ${{ job.status }}
          action: start
          trigger: ${{ github.event_name }}
